33.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
33.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

33.gl: six (as an overplus  beyond five or the fingers of the hand); as ord. sixth
33.dv: masculine שִׁשָּׁה; a primitive number; compare H7797 (שׂוּשׂ)

33.gl: hence (the ox's head being the first letter of the alphabet, and this eventually used as a numeral) a thousand

34.gl: to fasten upon; hence, to seize, be strong (figuratively, courageous, causatively strengthen, cure, help, repair, fortify), obstinate; to bind, restrain, conquer
34.kj: aid, amend, [idiom] calker, catch, cleave, confirm, be constant, constrain, continue, be of good (take) courage(-ous, -ly), encourage (self), be established, fasten, force, fortify

34.gl: to end, whether intransitive (to cease, be finished, perish) or transitived (to complete, prepare, consume)
34.kj: accomplish, cease, consume (away), determine, destroy (utterly), be (when... were) done, (be an) end (of), expire, (cause to) fail, faint, finish, fulfil, [idiom] fully, [idiom] ha

34.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
34.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

34.gl: properly, deputyship, i.e. ministry; generally, employment (never servile) or work (abstractly or concretely); also property (as the result of labor)
34.kj: business, [phrase] cattle, [phrase] industrious, occupation, ([phrase] -pied), [phrase] officer, thing (made), use, (manner of) work((-man), -manship).

34.gl: properly, leanness, i.e. (figuratively) limitation; only adverbial, merely, or conjunctional, although
34.kj: but, even, except, howbeit howsoever, at the least, nevertheless, nothing but, notwithstanding, only, save, so (that), surely, yet (so), in any wise.
34.dv: the same as H7534 (רַק) as a noun;

34.gl: to spread out (i.e. deploy in hostile array); by analogy, to strip (i.e. unclothe, plunder, flay, etc.)
34.kj: fall upon, flay, invade, make an invasion, pull off, put off, make a road, run upon, rush, set, spoil, spread selves (abroad), strip (off, self).

35.gl: properly, to be erect (i.e. stand perpendicular); hence (causatively) to set up, in a great variety of applications, whether literal (establish, fix, prepare, apply), or figurative (appoint, render sure, proper or prospe
35.kj: certain(-ty), confirm, direct, faithfulness, fashion, fasten, firm, be fitted, be fixed, frame, be meet, ordain, order, perfect, (make) preparation, prepare (self), provide, make p

35.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
35.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra
abundance(-antly), all, [idiom] common (sort), excellent, great(-ly, -ness, number), huge, be increased, long, many, more in number, most, much, multitude, plenty(-ifully), [idiom]

35.gl: a step or (collectively, stairs, as ascending); usually a holocaust (as going up in smoke)
35.kj: ascent, burnt offering (sacrifice), go up to. See also H5766 (עֶוֶל).
35.dv: or עוֹלָה; feminine active participle of H5927 (עָלָה);

35.kj: act, bondage, [phrase] bondservant, effect, labour, ministering(-try), office, service(-ile, -itude), tillage, use, work, [idiom] wrought.

35.gl: fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part
35.dv: or חֵלֶב; from an unused root meaning to be fat;

36.gl: a word; by implication, a matter (as spoken of) or thing; adverbially, a cause
36.kj: act, advice, affair, answer, [idiom] any such (thing), because of, book, business, care, case, cause, certain rate, [phrase] chronicles, commandment, [idiom] commune(-ication), [ph

36.gl: properly, to be erect (i.e. stand perpendicular); hence (causatively) to set up, in a great variety of applications, whether literal (establish, fix, prepare, apply), or figurative (appoint, render sure, proper or prospe
36.kj: certain(-ty), confirm, direct, faithfulness, fashion, fasten, firm, be fitted, be fixed, frame, be meet, ordain, order, perfect, (make) preparation, prepare (self), provide, make p

36.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
36.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

36.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative
36.kj: angels, [idiom] exceeding, God (gods) (-dess, -ly), [idiom] (very) great, judges, [idiom] mighty.

36.gl: Chizkijah, a king of Judah, also the name of two other Israelites
36.dv: or חִזְקִיָּהוּ; also יְחִזְקִיָּה; or יְחִזְקִיָּהוּ; from H2388 (חָזַק) and H3050 (יָהּ); strengthened of Jah;

36.gl: probably to brighten up, i.e. (figuratively) be (causatively, make) blithe or gleesome
36.kj: cheer up, be (make) glad, (have, make) joy(-ful), be (make) merry, (cause to, make to) rejoice, [idiom] very.
